# SMB AI Workflow & Agent Builder

## What It Does
This tool audits business workflows, scores automation readiness, identifies automation opportunities, designs AI-powered workflows, and builds safe AI agent pilot plans.

## Who It Serves
It is designed for small business owners, operators, freelancers, agencies, consultants, and automation builders.

## Main Use Cases
- Auditing existing business workflows for AI readiness.
- Scoring automation readiness of specific processes.
- Identifying and planning safe AI automation opportunities.
- Designing AI-powered workflows and AI agent pilot plans.
- Discovering "human in the loop" strategies to reduce risks.

## Safety Guidelines & Disclaimer
This GPT supports workflow planning and pilot design. It is not legal, financial, tax, HR, lending, accounting, or compliance advice. Sensitive decisions should stay under qualified human review.
